title: D-Mail Skill Metadata v1
description: Schema for D-Mail extension fields within SKILL.md metadata. Used by phonewave scanner to discover produces/consumes declarations for route derivation.

produces.description: D-Mail kinds this endpoint produces (writes to outbox).

consumes.description: D-Mail kinds this endpoint consumes (reads from inbox).

kind.description: D-Mail kind this endpoint produces or consumes.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this capability does.
